title: Communauté d'agglomération de Blois Agglopolys

infobox.value: This [Loir-et-Cher](/wiki/Loir-et-Cher "Loir-et-Cher") geographical article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Communaut%C3%A9_d%27agglom%C3%A9ration_de_Blois_Agglopolys&action=edit).

is an [intercommunal](/wiki/Communes_of_France#Intercommunality "Communes of France") structure, centred on the [city](/wiki/Communes_of_France "Communes of France") of [Blois](/wiki/Blois "Blois"). It is located in the [Loir-et-Cher](/wiki/Loir-et-Cher "Loir-et-Cher") [department](/wiki/Departments_of_France "Departments of France"), in the [Centre-Val de Loire](/wiki/Centre-Val_de_Loire "Centre-Val de Loire") [region](/wiki/Regions_of_France "Regions of France"), central [France](/wiki/France "France"). It was created in January 2012. Its seat is in Blois.[[1]](#cite_note-BANATIC-1) Its population was 105,635 in 2017, of which 46,086 in Blois proper.[[2]](#cite_note-comp-2)

[Comparateur de territoire](https://www.insee.fr/fr/statistiques/1405599?geo=COM-41018+EPCI-200030385), [Insee](/wiki/Institut_national_de_la_statistique_et_des_%C3%A9tudes_%C3%A9conomiques "Institut national de la statistique et des études économiques"). Retrieved 20 April 2021.

["Intercommunalité : Communauté d'agglomération de Blois "Agglopolys""](https://www.insee.fr/fr/metadonnees/geographie/intercommunalite/200030385-blois-agglopolys). **[Communauté d'agglomération](/wiki/Communaut%C3%A9_d%27agglom%C3%A9ration "Communauté d'agglomération") de Blois Agglopolys** is an [intercommunal](/wiki/Communes_of_France#Intercommunality "Communes of France") structure, centred on the [city](/wiki/Communes_of_France "Communes of France") of [Blois](/wiki/Blois "Blois"). It is located in the [Loir-et-Cher](/wiki/Loir-et-Cher "Loir-et-Cher") [department](/wiki/Departments_of_France "Departments of France"), in the [Centre-Val de Loire](/wiki/Centre-Val_de_Loire "Centre-Val de Loire") [region](/wiki/Regions_of_France "Regions of France"), central [France](/wiki/France "France"). It was created in January 2012. Its seat is in Blois.[[1]](#cite_note-BANATIC-1) Its population was 105,635 in 2017, of which 46,086 in Blois proper.[[2]](#cite_note-comp-2)

## Composition

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Communaut%C3%A9_d%27agglom%C3%A9ration_de_Blois_Agglopolys&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Composition")]

The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 43 communes:[[1]](#cite_note-BANATIC-1)[[3]](#cite_note-insee-3)

1. [Averdon](/wiki/Averdon "Averdon")
2. [Blois](/wiki/Blois "Blois")
3. [Candé-sur-Beuvron](/wiki/Cand%C3%A9-sur-Beuvron "Candé-sur-Beuvron")
4. [Cellettes](/wiki/Cellettes,_Loir-et-Cher "Cellettes, Loir-et-Cher")
5. [Chailles](/wiki/Chailles "Chailles")
6. [Champigny-en-Beauce](/wiki/Champigny-en-Beauce "Champigny-en-Beauce")
